caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering sits at a table in a studio setting. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logo repeated vertically with gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. On the table sits a black mug with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK ONLY". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands; he starts with his hands open and moving, then briefly clasps them together while looking slightly to the side, and finally returns to gesturing with both hands. He wears a gold watch and a ring on his left hand. The camera angle remains static throughout the clip.
